accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill; the definition of cardiomyopathy as heart muscle conditions is accurate and consistent with the bill's own definition.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies cardiomyopathy education, awareness, research, and school AED/CPR programs as the purpose.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill establishes programs and requirements, accurately capturing the operative change at a high level.

exceptions_conditions.why: Omits the no-additional-funds provision and grant eligibility conditions, which are material provisions of the bill.

effective_dates.why: Does not mention any of the deadlines (18 months, 30 months) specified in the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: All four major provisions (education dissemination, risk assessment, CDC/NIH reports, grant program) captured at a high level.

correct_entities.why: HHS, CDC, NIH, and public schools correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: No figures stated; omission is acceptable.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
